annotations.label: Mathematician

anchor.snippet: A mathematician is someone who uses an extensive knowledge of mathematics in their work

annotations.note: A sociological description of a profession, not a mathematical statement that could be formalized in Mathlib.

annotations.label: Applied mathematician

anchor.snippet: Mathematicians involved with solving problems with applications in real life are called applied mathematicians

annotations.note: Describes a category of professionals rather than a formal mathematical object or theorem.

annotations.label: Pure mathematics

anchor.snippet: Pure mathematics is mathematics that studies entirely abstract concepts

annotations.note: A philosophical characterization of a field of study, not a formalizable mathematical statement.
